title: Smoky Crispy American Prosciutto Wraps
description: A savory and juicy festive dish featuring prosciutto wrapped in a low-carb wrap for a keto-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Salted caramel sauce or sweet butter (optional for dipping)

instructions: Wrap each slice of prosciutto around a keto bread wrap or lettuce leaf, ensuring it is fully covered.
Place the wrapped prosciutto in the preheated oven and bake for about 6 minutes until crispy and golden brown.
While the wraps are baking, prepare a salted caramel sauce or sweet butter to serve on the side as a dipping option.
Remove from oven and let cool enough to handle before serving. Serve with your choice of condiments if desired.
